text:
Moon as a malefic gave a new job by the middle of
July, 49 and he gave it up on the first of Aug., 49. The
conjunction of the Me was not favourable. It was in Guru-

Symbolic Directions 121
Guru-Rahu. The second is a square and it gave an uneasy
position. It was in Rahu~Ravi-Rahu. The third brought disci
plinary proceedings. The trine was malefic. It was in Shani
Chandra-Chandra. The trine was' as unfavourable as the
square because the malefic Moon is with the sixth lord. The
last brought about a highly serious ailment of the wife. It was
in Budha-Ravi-Shukra.
Let us look at some other aspects to the four factors men
tioned earlier:
1. Me 42.25.37 = 62.6.26 + 10.21
2. Me 32.34.23 = 52.8.16 + 10.21
3. M 12.25.37 = 32.6.26 + 10.21
=
4. Ascd. 27.7.37 47.3.8 + 9.24
5. 32.52.23 = 52.12.6 + 9.24
6. MC 67.37.57 = 87.9.10 + 9.24
7. 59.1.36 = 79.2.2 + 9.21
8. 63.47.9 = 83.11.5+10.3
9. 67.29.56 = 87.7.22 + 8.2
10. 67.30.4 = 87.7.22 + 8.2
11. 37.37.29 = 57.9.7 + 10.20
12. 62.51.56 = 82.12.4 + 10.
